headline: Citi Initiates Alnylam (ALNY) With Buy Rating
summary: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:ALNY) is one of the 12 Best Revenue Growth Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On May 19, Citi initiated coverage of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:ALNY), giving the stock a Buy rating and setting the price target at $380. headline: Citigroup to Accelerate Asia Wealth Expansion With Major Hiring Push
summary: C is set to concentrate much of its wealth hiring in Asia, adding nearly 100 private bankers and 400 specialists to strengthen profitability.

headline: JPM, WFC & Others Clear Key Regulatory Hurdle on Living Wills
